sn1.31:1.1:
Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​
ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. Atha kho sambahulā satullapakāyikā devatāyo abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇā kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu.
sn1.31:1.2: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho ekā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:1.3:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
seyyo hoti na pāpiyo"ti.
sn1.31:2.2: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:2.3:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
paññā labbhati nāññato"ti.
Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:3.2:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
sokamajjhe na socatī"ti.
Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:3.3:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
ñātimajjhe virocatī"ti.
Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:3.4:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
sattā gacchanti suggatin"ti.
Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:3.5:
"Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
sattā tiṭṭhanti sātatan"ti.
sn1.31:3.6: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "kassa nu kho, bhagavā, subhāsitan"ti?
sn1.31:3.7: "Sabbāsaṁ vo subhāsitaṁ pariyāyena, api ca mamapi suṇātha –
sn1.31:3.8:
Sabbhireva samāsetha,
sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;
Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,
sabbadukkhā pamuccatī"ti.
sn1.31:3.9: Idamavoca bhagavā. Attamanā tā devatāyo bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyiṁsūti.
